mapper.select: SELECT ORDER_SEQ orderSeq, ORDER_ITEM orderItem, MODEL_NM modelNm, AMOUNT amount, TO_CHAR(SHIP_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') shipDate, SHIP_ADDRESS shipAddress, OP_NM opNm, OP_PHONE opPhone, AGENT_MEMO agentMemo, AGENT_ID agentId, --F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_ID) AGENT_NAME, AGENT_ID agentName, TO_CHAR(REQ_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') reqDate, TO_CHAR(RECORD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') recordDate, STATUS status, TO_CHAR(OP_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') opDate, ADMIN_ID adminId, BONSA_ADMIN_ID bonsaAdminId, ADMIN_MEMO adminMemo, TO_CHAR(FINISH_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') finishDate FROM PPS_ONLINE_ORDER WHERE ORDER_SEQ = #{orderSeq}
